name: 1.Importacion Ciudades
query:
WITH
"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1jKVmoEljg_MYs8Q6h-S_uzXmMp6tsKP-"
AS uri
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM uri AS row
MERGE (c:Ciudad {nombre:row.nombre})
SET c.id = toFloat(row.id)

name: 1.Importacion Relaciones
query:
WITH
"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1s-vDv9uSKT1_gSy9UZSXAMCnf2aG54JA"
AS uri
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM uri AS row

MATCH (c1:Ciudad {nombre: row.origen})
MATCH (c2:Ciudad {nombre: row.destino})

MERGE (c1)-[r:CONECTA]->(c2)
SET r.distancia = toFloat(row.distancia),
    r.coste = toFloat(row.coste),
    r.trafico = toFloat(row.trafico);

name: 3.Camino mas corto Distancia
query:
MATCH (origen:Ciudad {nombre: 'Barcelona'}), (destino:Ciudad {nombre:
'Santiago'})
CALL gds.shortestPath.dijkstra.stream('grafoCiudades', {
sourceNode: origen,
targetNode: destino,
 relationshipWeightProperty: 'distancia'})
YIELD index, sourceNode, targetNode, totalCost, nodeIds,
costs, path
RETURN
gds.util.asNode(sourceNode).nombre AS Origen,
gds.util.asNode(targetNode).nombre AS Destino,
totalCost AS costeTotal,
[nodeId IN nodeIds | gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre] AS
nodosRecorridos,
costs AS costeAcumulado,
nodes(path) AS recorrido;

query:
MATCH (origen:Ciudad {nombre: 'Barcelona'}), (destino:Ciudad {nombre:

name: 6.1 Creación de nueva ciudad y relación
query:
CREATE (b:Ciudad {id:20.0, nombre:"Badajoz"})
WITH b
MATCH (m:Ciudad {nombre:"Madrid"}), (s:Ciudad {nombre:"Sevilla"})
CREATE (b)-[:CONECTA {distancia:250, coste:33, trafico:2}]->(m),
       (m)-[:CONECTA {distancia:250, coste:33, trafico:2}]->(b),
       (b)-[:CONECTA {distancia:200, coste:30, trafico:1}]->(s),
       (s)-[:CONECTA {distancia:200, coste:30, trafico:1}]->(b);

name: 6.1.1. Actualización del grafo para que funcione

query:

name: 1.1 Importación usuarios
query:
WITH
"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1jqm5TywqNcTPi7-ZEK7U3-rThADuLT88"
AS uri
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM uri AS row
MERGE (i:Influencer {nombre:row.nombre, seguidores:row.seguidores, categoria:row.categoria})
SET i.id = toInteger(row.id)

name: 1.2 Importación Comparte
query:
WITH "https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1WAg_5Wsh0OZVm04dsJV9jUhgzCUqoe7-" AS uri LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM uri AS row
MATCH (u1:Usuario {id: toInteger(row.origen)})
MATCH (u2:Usuario {id: toInteger(row.destino)})

MERGE (u1)-[r:COMPARTE]->(u2)

name: 3.1 Centralidad ordenado por grado
query:
CALL gds.degree.stream('grafoInfluencer')
YIELD nodeId, score
RETURN gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre AS nombre, 
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).seguidores AS seguidores,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).categoria AS categoria,
score as grado
ORDER BY grado DESC

name: 4.1 Grado Cercania
query:
CALL gds.closeness.stream('grafoInfluencer')
YIELD nodeId, score
RETURN gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre AS nombre,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).seguidores AS seguidores,
score AS grado_cercania
ORDER BY grado_cercania DESC, seguidores DESC

name: 5.1 Grado Intermediacion
query:
CALL gds.betweenness.stream('grafoInfluencer')
YIELD nodeId, score
RETURN gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre AS nombre, 
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).seguidores AS seguidores,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).categoria AS categoria,
score AS grado_intermediacion
ORDER BY score DESC

name: 7.1 Conteo Triangulos
query:
CALL gds.triangleCount.stream('grafoInfluencer')
YIELD nodeId, triangleCount
RETURN gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre AS nombre,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).seguidores AS seguidores,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).categoria AS categoria,
triangleCount AS conteo_triangulos
ORDER BY conteo_triangulos DESC

name: 8.1 Coeficiente de centralidad local
query:
CALL
gds.localClusteringCoefficient.stream('grafoInfluencer')
YIELD nodeId, localClusteringCoefficient
RETURN gds.util.asNode(nodeId).nombre AS nombre,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).seguidores AS seguidores,
gds.util.asNode(nodeId).categoria AS categoria,
localClusteringCoefficient AS coeficiente_clustering_local
ORDER BY coeficiente_clustering_local DESC
